message:
chore(beads): sync issue tracker state after model/export/TUI enhancements

Update .beads/issues.jsonl to reflect the current issue state after the
model, SQLite export population, export pages integration, CLI related-
work improvements, and TUI view mode additions.

Archive 30 beads history snapshots covering the 2026-03-09 session
(01:57 through 04:56 UTC). These .br_history entries capture the
incremental issue state transitions as features were developed and
issues were resolved or updated.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
